title: One Piece
author: Oda Eiichiro
description: Monkey D. Luffy explores the Grand Line in search of the legendary One Piece treasure to become Pirate King.

title: Naruto
author: Kishimoto Masashi
description: A young ninja seeks recognition from his peers and dreams of becoming Hokage.

title: Bleach
author: Kubo Tite
description: Ichigo Kurosaki gains soul reaper powers and battles hollows to protect his world.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Isayama Hajime
description: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid creatures called Titans.

title: Death Note
author: Ohba Tsugumi
description: A high school student discovers a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Arakawa Hiromu
description: Two brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Gotouge Koyoharu
description: Tanjiro becomes a demon slayer to save his demon-turned sister.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Akutami Gege
description: Yuji Itadori swallows a cursed object and joins a school of jujutsu sorcerers.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Horikoshi Kohei
description: In a world of superpowers, a quirkless boy strives to become the greatest hero.

title: Berserk
author: Miura Kentaro
description: Guts, a lone mercenary, fights against demonic forces in a dark medieval world.

title: Vagabond
author: Inoue Takehiko
description: A fictional retelling of the life of legendary swordsman Miyamoto Musashi.

title: Monster
author: Urasawa Naoki
description: A doctor hunts a former patient who has become a serial killer.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Yukimura Makoto
description: A young Viking warrior seeks revenge on the man who killed his father.

title: Fruits Basket
author: Takaya Natsuki
description: An orphan girl discovers a family cursed to transform into zodiac animals.

title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War
author: Akasaka Aka
description: Two genius students engage in mind games to make the other confess their love.

title: Spy x Family
author: Endo Tatsuya
description: A spy, an assassin, and a telepath form a fake family to maintain world peace.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Fujimoto Tatsuki
description: Denji merges with his pet devil and becomes the chainsaw devil hunter.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Toriyama Akira
description: Goku, a martial artist with a monkey tail, searches for the seven dragon balls.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
author: Ishida Sui
description: A college student becomes a half-ghoul after a fateful encounter.

title: Haikyuu!!
author: Furudate Haruichi
description: A short volleyball enthusiast joins his high school team to reach nationals.

title: Slam Dunk
author: Inoue Takehiko
description: A delinquent joins his high school basketball team to impress a girl.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Togashi Yoshihiro
description: Gon embarks on a journey to become a hunter and find his missing father.

title: Inuyasha
author: Takahashi Rumiko
description: A modern girl travels to feudal Japan and teams up with a half-demon.

title: Fairy Tail
author: Mashima Hiro
description: Members of the Fairy Tail wizard guild take on magical jobs and adventures.

title: Black Clover
author: Tabata Yuki
description: A magicless boy strives to become Wizard King in a magical kingdom.

title: Noragami
author: Adachitoka
description: A minor god takes odd jobs in hopes of building his own shrine someday.

title: Blue Lock
author: Kaneshiro Muneyuki
description: Japanese striker hopefuls compete in a brutal training program.

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
author: Yamada Kanehito
description: An elf mage reflects on her former adventuring party long after their quest.

title: Real
author: Inoue Takehiko
description: Three young men confront wheelchair basketball and their personal struggles.

title: 20th Century Boys
author: Urasawa Naoki
description: Childhood friends reunite to stop a doomsday cult based on their old fantasies.

title: Oyasumi Punpun
author: Asano Inio
description: A surreal coming-of-age story about a boy depicted as a small bird.

title: Nana
author: Yazawa Ai
description: Two young women named Nana share an apartment and intertwined lives in Tokyo.

title: Yotsuba&!
author: Azuma Kiyohiko
description: An eccentric little girl explores the world with childlike wonder.

title: Planetes
author: Yukimura Makoto
description: Space debris collectors navigate work and life in near-future orbit.

title: Solo Leveling
author: Chugong
description: The weakest hunter awakens a system that lets him level up alone.
